summary: Iteration 124: Bug Fix Verification - ALL TESTS PASSED. 3 bug fixes verified: 1) Licensee year-projections endpoint with try/except wrapper working correctly, 2) CrossCurrent Rewards card hidden for licensees, 3) 'Open Rewards & Store' link contains /store path. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All licensee features verified working.

issues: Console warnings about DialogContent requiring DialogTitle for accessibility - not critical but should be addressed for a11y compliance

bug_1_projection_failures.issue: Failed to load projections on licensee dashboard (RECURRING REGRESSION)
bug_1_projection_failures.fix: Backend projection endpoint hardened with try/except wrapper at line 7584-7650
bug_1_projection_failures.frontend_fix: Auto-retry mechanism added (2 retries) in loadLicenseeData at DashboardPage.jsx line 130-178
evidence: Frontend: No 'Failed to load projections' error found on page

bug_2_rewards_card_hidden.issue: CrossCurrent Rewards card should be HIDDEN for licensees (not part of rewards program)
bug_2_rewards_card_hidden.fix: Frontend condition at DashboardPage.jsx line 436: (isMember || isSimulating) && !isLicenseeView
evidence: Frontend: Rizza (licensee) dashboard - Rewards card NOT visible
Frontend: My Rewards nav item NOT visible in sidebar for licensee
Frontend: Admin dashboard - My Rewards nav IS visible (admin is not licensee)

bug_3_rewards_store_link.issue: 'Open Rewards & Store' link goes to homepage not store panel
bug_3_rewards_store_link.fix: Store link updated to /store path in DashboardPage.jsx and MyRewardsPage.jsx
evidence: My Rewards page: 'Open Rewards & Store' href = https://rewards.crosscur.rent/store?user_id=xxx
Returns: total, ok, broken, fixed counts + per-user status

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified working. Projection endpoint is now hardened with try/except and returns proper 404/500 errors instead of crashing. Rewards card visibility logic: (isMember || isSimulating) && !isLicenseeView - this ensures licensees don't see it. Admin simulation flow: Simulate View dropdown → Honorary Licensee View → Select specific licensee → Start Simulation. The simulation dropdown uses shadcn Select component - wait for options to load before selecting.
